themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Who hitherto waited in the king's gate eastward —this identifies Levitical gatekeepers' speci...". Word-study detail reinforces "הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ: Who hitherto waited in the king's - a king".
